description_long: This object is a small, vintage-style biplane with a boxy fuselage and two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically. The wings are supported by struts and the tail features a distinctive V-shaped horizontal stabilizer. At the front, a two-blade propeller is mounted on a rounded nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels beneath the lower wing. The cockpit is open and centrally located between the wings, with no visible canopy or enclosure. The exterior is finished in a uniform tan or light yellow color, with metallic accents on the propeller and landing gear.
description: A tan, vintage-style biplane with stacked wings, a V-tail, open cockpit, and a front-mounted propeller.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stacked wings, V-tail, and open cockpit, with the propeller visible at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two-blade propeller, dual main wheels, and the vertical stacking of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the V-tail and open cockpit clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the V-tail configuration and the back of the fuselage, with the wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings in a mid-wing arrangement, supported by vertical struts and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two upward-angled stabilizers and no vertical fin.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail skid or wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located centrally between the upper and lower wings, mid-fuselage, with no canopy.
